playbook.intent: Capture one architecture decision so the client ARB accepts it, AI agents can replay it, and the next dev finds it in 18 months.
playbook.scope: Atomic doc task: one architecture decision committed to an ADR ready for client architecture review board. Output: ADR + decision-driver chain + tradeoff frame + AI-replayable summary. Used 1-3 times per sprint on a typical engagement.

stage.name: Frame decision
stage.intent: Make the decision before you write the doc.

tasks.task: Walk the decision driver chain (what triggered it)
Map to quality attributes (perf, sec, availability, cost)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when ≥2 alternatives were honestly considered.

stage.name: Write ADR
stage.intent: Convert the decision into a doc the ARB accepts.

tasks.task: Selling-ideas: defend the choice without overselling
Capture stakeholder context for ARB review

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the ADR is self-contained (a stranger reads it without context).

stage.name: Tradeoff + AI-replayable summary
stage.intent: Make the doc resilient for AI agents and future devs.
stage.decision-gate: Done when ADR is indexed AND an AI-agent can answer 'why this choice' from the doc alone.

extra.value: [Full design document — single decision in focus, Architecture spike — work happens elsewhere, Sprint planning — separate ceremony]
[Decision is made or near-final, Client ADR template accepted, Quality attributes / NFRs documented]
[Writing the ADR after the decision is forgotten — drift between doc and intent, Skipping alternatives — looks defensive at ARB, No AI-replayable summary — agents reinvent the decision next sprint]
['Could the next dev find this ADR via repo search?', 'Did the ARB ratify it without rewrites?', 'Does the AI summary survive a context-free read?']

{human: faion get-content adr-write-up-client-architecture --format md, agent: faion get-content adr-write-up-client-architecture --format context, json: faion get-content adr-write-up-client-architecture --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
